rows.label: qev013206_MSG0001
rows.name:
I feel bad for Bates, but I placed my
bets on you. You better win this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013206_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Eh? What do I mean by bets?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013206_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, it sounded interesting,
so everyone on the team decided
to bet on who would win.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013206_MSG0004
rows.name:
Right now it's 6:4 in your favor. I'm
counting on you, my precious drinking
money is on the line. Don't lose![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013206_MSG0005
rows.name:
I was out exploring around here
too, but it looks like things
turned into quite a mess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013206_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hmmm... Corondas's team hasn't done
anything to earn the grudge of some
incomprehensible woman, though...[ST:wait ]
